title: Fragments
description: Fragments is a mod that adds various elemental fragments to the game, as well as weapons and items that you can craft with them
body:
Fragments is a very work-in-progress Minecraft mod for 1.20.1 powered by Fabric. It adds four elemental fragments (hence the name), those of fire, water, earth, and air. (Sounds familiar, doesn't it?)

Furthermore, the mod adds numerous items, most of which can only be crafted with the aforementioned fragments. These include weapons, tools, and other miscellaneous items to shake up your Minecraft experience.

If you check out the mod, you've already done more than enough to help me, and my thanks are immeasurable. However, if you wish to go above and beyond, I'll have a link to my Discord in the links area, where I'll post updates from time to time.

Thanks,

TyBoy158
